title: Short title
doc_html:
PART IX.  FORMOSAN TERMITE INITIATIVE

§3391.1.  Short title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Formosan Termite Initiative Act".

Acts 1999, No. 486, §1, eff. June 21, 1999.
